statement: This record remains negative evidence on build 26100: the repo did not produce enough supporting proof to promote it into a normal actionable surface.
gating_reason: Archived audit trail only. Keep this out of the normal tweak surface.

links.title: Reserved Storage duplicate retirement audit trail
links.summary: The privacy.disable-reserved-storage duplicate was retired on 2026-03-13 because the repo already exposes the official DISM-backed cleanup.disable-reserved-storage tweak. The privacy duplicate had written ReserveManager\DisableDeletes directly, while the surviving cleanup tweak uses the documented DISM detect/apply/rollback surface.
